action.content:
You are playing a cooperative negotiation game in which you have to agree on how to divide a set of items among you and another player.

Rules:
(a) You and the other player are given a set of items. Each of you is also given a secret value function, representing how much you value each type of object.
(b) You exchange messages with the other player to agree on who gets which items. You can send a maximum of 5 messages each, or terminate early by making a secret proposal at any time.
(c) You are each asked to submit a secret proposal indicating the items you want formatted in square brackets as follows: "[Proposal: <number> <object name>, <number> <object name>, <...>]"
(d) If your proposals are complementary, i.e., there are enough items to fulfill both proposals, each player is awarded a score based on the sum of values for the items they received. Otherwise, both of you get zero points.
(e) Your goal is to maximize the sum of your score and the score of the other player.

Let us start.

The set of available items is:

1 pot, 3 magnets, 1 plate

Your secret value function is:

pot: 5, magnet: 0, plate: 5

IMPORTANT: Your messages, unless it is the secret proposal, are directly transmitted to the other player, so do not include any response to the rules or text announcing your message. To make a secret proposal, use the indicated format. Do not use square brackets when communicating to the other player or it will be interpreted as your secret proposal.
action.label: context

action.content: Hello! I'd like to work together to maximize our combined score. To start, could you tell me which items you value most? I'm particularly interested in some items but flexible on others, so I think we can find a good arrangement.
action.label: response

Let us start.

1 pot, 3 magnets, 1 plate

Your secret value function is:

pot: 4, magnet: 2, plate: 0

IMPORTANT: Your messages, unless it is the secret proposal, are directly transmitted to the other player, so do not include any response to the rules or text announcing your message. Hello! I'd like to work together to maximize our combined score. To start, could you tell me which items you value most? I'm particularly interested in some items but flexible on others, so I think we can find a good arrangement.
action.label: context

action.content: I value the pot most, followed by the magnets. The plate has little value to me. What about you - which items are most important to you? If we share our preferences, we can make sure each of us gets the items we value most and maximize our total points.
action.label: response

action.content: I value the pot most, followed by the magnets. The plate has little value to me. What about you - which items are most important to you? If we share our preferences, we can make sure each of us gets the items we value most and maximize our total points.

I value the pot most, followed by the magnets. The plate has little value to me. What about you - which items are most important to you? If we share our preferences, we can make sure each of us gets the items we value most and maximize our total points.
action.label: context

action.content:
That works out well! I value the plate most, and the pot is also valuable to me. However, I don't value the magnets at all - they're worth nothing to me.

Since we both value the pot, but you also value the magnets and I don't, here's what I think maximizes our total score: You take the pot and all 3 magnets, and I take the plate. This way you get items you value highly, and I get the item that's most important to me while you get items I don't care about. Does that sound good to you?
action.label: response

action.content:
That sounds perfect! You're right - this arrangement maximizes our combined score since you get the plate which is most valuable to you, and I get the pot and magnets which I value highly. Since the magnets are worthless to you but valuable to me, we're making great use of our different preferences.

I agree to your proposal: I'll take the pot and all 3 magnets, and you take the plate.

[Proposal: 1 pot, 3 magnets]
action.label: response

action.content: The other player has submitted a secret proposal. It is now your turn to submit a proposal of your own.
action.label: context
